queries.compiledQueryString:
SELECT
  COUNT(*) AS total_orders,
  ROUND(SUM(sale_price), 2) AS total_revenue,
  ROUND(AVG(sale_price), 2) AS avg_order_value
FROM order_items
WHERE status NOT IN ('Cancelled', 'Returned')
queries.inputQueryString:
SELECT
  COUNT(*) AS total_orders,
  ROUND(SUM(sale_price), 2) AS total_revenue,
  ROUND(AVG(sale_price), 2) AS avg_order_value
FROM order_items
WHERE status NOT IN ('Cancelled', 'Returned')

queries.compiledQueryString:
SELECT
  LEFT(CAST(created_at AS VARCHAR), 7) AS month,
  ROUND(SUM(sale_price), 2) AS revenue,
  COUNT(*) AS orders
FROM order_items
WHERE status NOT IN ('Cancelled', 'Returned')
GROUP BY month
ORDER BY month
queries.inputQueryString:
SELECT
  LEFT(CAST(created_at AS VARCHAR), 7) AS month,
  ROUND(SUM(sale_price), 2) AS revenue,
  COUNT(*) AS orders
FROM order_items
WHERE status NOT IN ('Cancelled', 'Returned')
GROUP BY month
ORDER BY month

queries.compiledQueryString:
SELECT
  p.category,
  ROUND(SUM(oi.sale_price), 2) AS revenue,
  COUNT(*) AS orders
FROM order_items oi
JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.id
WHERE oi.status NOT IN ('Cancelled', 'Returned')
GROUP BY p.category
ORDER BY revenue DESC
LIMIT 10
queries.inputQueryString:
SELECT
  p.category,
  ROUND(SUM(oi.sale_price), 2) AS revenue,
  COUNT(*) AS orders
FROM order_items oi
JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.id
WHERE oi.status NOT IN ('Cancelled', 'Returned')
GROUP BY p.category
ORDER BY revenue DESC
LIMIT 10
